title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at IRCTC Tourism - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at IRCTC Tourism - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IRCTC Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Raipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IRCTC Tourism:
IRCTC Tourism is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IRCTC Tourism!
